01 / About

WHO
AM I?

Hi, I'm Vighnesh — a first-year Computer Engineering student at MIT Academy of Engineering, Pune.

I'm passionate about how software works. Currently diving deep into programming fundamentals, data structures, AI literacy, and web development. Every project I build is a chance to grow a little more.

03 / Projects

THINGS I'VE BUILT

01

Personal Portfolio Website

Designed and built this portfolio entirely from scratch using HTML & CSS. Focused on bold typography, structured layout, glowing card effects, and a high-contrast dark aesthetic to present information in a memorable, professional way.

HTML CSS Design Responsive
02

Traffic Signal Controller Using ICs

Built a hardware-based traffic light sequence using digital ICs, timing logic, LEDs, and circuit testing. The project focused on understanding sequential control, practical circuit wiring, and reliable signal timing without using a microcontroller.

Digital Logic ICs Electronics Circuit Design
03

Random Password Generator Using Linux

Created a Linux-based password generator that produces strong random passwords from the command line. Practiced shell usage, randomness, secure password patterns, and basic automation for quick terminal workflows.

Linux Shell Security Automation
